economic_notes: Band has partnership interests in several limited partnerships, membership in three societies and shareholdings in ten companies. Investments include Coast Tsimshian Resources LP, Lax Kw'alaams Fishing Enterprises LP, Lax Kw'alaams (MV Nucleus) LLP, Lax Kw'alaams Business Development LP, and Lax Kw'alaams Holdings LP. Committed to CMHC-funded affordable housing projects (20-unit, 8-unit, 6-unit). Resource agreements revenue of $4,431,465.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Investments totaling $42,521,885 accounted for using modified equity method (5 limited partnerships). Interfund administration and rent charges of $3,366,331 not eliminated for consolidation. Council honoraria $766,720 and travel $260,334 disclosed separately. Scheduled principal repayments $346,688/year over next 5 years; actual 2023 repayment was $457,184. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $38,054,263 + DFO $246,330 + FNHA $3,002,960 + Province of BC $5,362,140 = $46,665,693. Significant increase in Capital Development expenditure ($5.5M actual vs $42.9M budget). Housing commitments: 20-unit CMHC project ($1,145,500 contribution + $7,920,534 mortgage), 8-unit project, and 6-unit CMHC mortgage of $1,293,000.
